connectorUiConfig.title: Island Enterprise Browser V2
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Island Enterprise Browser V2 Data Connector allows you to ingest user events, admin events, and system events, all within a single connector.

sampleQueries.query:
Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 10

union Island_UserEvents_V2_CL, Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL, Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize count()

dataTypes.name: Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_UserEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_AdminEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
Island_SystemEvents_V2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Island API Key
customs.description: An Island API key is required. Generate the API Key via Island Management Console. For further instructions, refer to the [official Island documentation](https://documentation.island.io/docs/configure-the-microsoft-sentinel-integration).

instructionSteps.description:
API URL and API Key are available via Island Management Console. For further instructions, refer to the [official Island documentation](https://documentation.island.io/docs/configure-the-microsoft-sentinel-integration).
>
instructionSteps.title: Connect Island to Microsoft Sentinel
